fixes.rationale: Reserve the removed int32 log_rate_limit tag 24 and move log_sample_config to a fresh tag so mixed-version protobuf readers do not silently drop the new message field.
fixes.suggested_patch:
reserved 24; // old log_rate_limit, removed; do not reuse
    LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config = 25;

fixes.rationale: Use the existing RepeatedPtrField overload directly in the PROTO_REF case to avoid copying every protobuf key before truncating access-log output.

skipped.reason: Requires restoring append-style formatting across helper declaration, implementation, call sites, and tests; no safe single-line replacement covers the allocation/copy regression.
Requires structural factoring of facade setter/state plumbing across header and implementation; not safe as a small contiguous suggestion.
Requires shared snapshot-publication helper refactoring across config sources; no minimal local edit safely removes the duplicated lifecycle logic.
